title: saxifraga nitida var. glabra
intro: Saxifraga nitida var. glabra, also known as the rock saxifrage or glabrous saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and fever. The health benefits of Saxifraga nitida var. glabra include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Saxifraga nitida var. glabra can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
